subject: Add PM Mapper client id and password
commit_message:
Add PM Mapper client id and password

Change-Id: I798f29679e5760a46341ec58485bd44a9880cf49
Issue-ID: INT-1375
Signed-off-by: rajendrajaiswal <rajendra.jaiswal@ericsson.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

GLOBAL_DCAE_USERNAME = '{{ .Values.dcaeUsername }}'
GLOBAL_DCAE_PASSWORD = '{{ .Values.dcaePassword}}'
GLOBAL_DCAE_AUTHENTICATION = [GLOBAL_DCAE_USERNAME, GLOBAL_DCAE_PASSWORD]

already exists and has the correct password and is not hard coded

Abandoned

Duplicate config .. hence abandoning ..tnx Daniel ..

Restored

updating values.ymal as data is wrong.

Patch Set 3:

I cant see what changed in the properties file since it says the whole thing changed,  dis anything change?
